title: Classification
text: Classification Interface definition for a variable or operation parameter with Data Type Handle or XMLStream . Description If the Data Type is XMLStream , specify the DTD for the data contents. If the Data Type is Handle , specify the component signature that the handle points to. Applies to Global Variable Signature Parameter Related Links Signatures A Uniface signature describes the remote interface of a component. The interface enables other components to address the component without knowing anything about the implementation. This allows components of different origin to communicate through their respective interfaces. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
